title: Dewback flank
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dewback flank''' was dried [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]] meat that was often eaten by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]]. It was described as tasting like [[Leather/Legends|leather]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]

[[Category:Meat]]
